buildCommand: bash -c 'apt-get update -y && apt-get install -y libcairo2-dev pkg-config python3-dev libglib2.0-0 && python -m pip install --upgrade pip && pip install -r requirements.txt'
installCommand: bash -c 'apt-get update -y && apt-get install -y libcairo2-dev pkg-config python3-dev libglib2.0-0'
